name: Revez Corporation Ltd.
summary: Revez Corporation Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the developing and implementation of information technology solutions. It operates through IT Solutions; Meetings, Incentive, Conferences, Exhibitions (MICE); and Digital Media Networks segments. The IT Solutions segment provides simple applications and websites; comprehensive tailor-made integrated solutions, which includes design and development of integrated suite of solutions, immersive multimedia, artificial intelligence, internet of things, information and communications technology, software-as-a-service, and creative and content services; engineering consultancy; and robotic solutions and services to customers. The MICE segment offers design and installation support to its solutions, which are installed in showrooms, exhibition halls, product launches, and customer service centers. The Digital Media Networks segment is involved in creating, owning, and implementing award-winning digital media solutions and media networks; and digital out-of-home, advertising networks, and digital sport networks. The company is headquartered in Singapore. Revez Corporation Ltd. is a subsidiary of L3N Capital Pte. Ltd.
